legend.note: FAIL = not done, broken, or rejected. PENDING_REVIEW = built and packet emitted, awaiting reviewer verdict. PASS = reviewed, approved, merged, and verified. The executor may set PENDING_REVIEW but NEVER PASS — PASS is set by the human/reviewer after approval. The maker does not grade its own work.
legend.priority: lower number = higher priority; agent picks the highest-priority FAIL

features.name: <short, specific feature name>
features.verify: <concrete, runnable check — e.g. 'pnpm test foo.spec.ts && invalid transitions rejected'>
